stories.headline: Bitcoin 2026 opens in Vegas with FBI's Patel, acting AG Blanche keynoting Day 1
stories.tldr: The world's largest Bitcoin conference kicks off Monday in Las Vegas with a federal law enforcement headline panel framing code as free speech.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sitting FBI and DOJ leaders sharing a Bitcoin stage signals how far the U.S. enforcement posture has shifted under the new administration — a tailwind for builders still spooked by 2023-era subpoenas.
the_details: Day 1 fireside chat 'Code is Free Speech: Ending the War on Bitcoin' features FBI Director Kash Patel and acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche.
Conference runs April 27–29 at the Las Vegas Convention Center, the biggest Bitcoin event globally by attendance.
Backdrop: BTC trading near $79K, up roughly 2% on the day after stalling at $80K resistance overnight.

stories.headline: April crypto hacks hit $606M across 12 incidents — worst month since Feb 2025
stories.tldr: Drift and Kelp DAO alone accounted for nearly $580M as Lazarus Group attribution turns April 2026 into DeFi's bloodiest month in over a year.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Three times Q1's total losses in 18 days vaporizes the 'DeFi is maturing' narrative right as the SEC eases UI broker rules — security debt is now the binding constraint on TVL recovery.
the_details: Drift Protocol drained for $285M on April 1 via a durable-nonce flaw; KelpDAO lost $292M through a LayerZero bridge bug.
U.S. and South Korean authorities have attributed both exploits to North Korea's Lazarus Group.
Smaller hits include CoW Swap, Zerion, Rhea Finance and Silo Finance, lifting the running tally past $606M with three days left in April.

stories.headline: Solana ETF inflows collapse 92% from November peak as SOL slides 38% YTD
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETFs are pulling just $34M in April versus $419M last November, with capital concentrating in Bitcoin products as altcoin season stalls.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The first non-BTC/ETH ETF cohort is failing its real-world stress test — a warning for issuers lining up XRP and DOGE products that institutional altcoin demand may be a 2025 artifact.
the_details: Spot Solana ETF monthly inflows fell from $419M in November 2025 to $34M in April 2026.
SOL trades near $86 with a $49.8B market cap, down ~38% year-to-date and ranked seventh by market cap.
Altcoin Season Index sits at 33–38, deep in 'Bitcoin Season' territory; Drift exploit aftermath weighs on Solana DeFi sentiment.

stories.headline: BTC stalls at $80K wall as crude above $90 caps risk appetite
stories.tldr: Bitcoin briefly cleared $79K in Asia before sellers capped the move at $80K, with rising oil prices and altcoin weakness dragging spot back below $78K.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A second rejection at $80K with strong ETF flows behind it shows how much sustained crude-driven inflation is throttling the BTC bid — macro now outranks plumbing.
the_details: WTI holds above $90 and Brent above $100 as Iran-related supply disruption continues; pre-war pricing was below $70.
Spot BTC ETFs and a $5B USDT supply expansion this month have so far failed to break the $80K cap.
Fear & Greed Index ticks to 47 (Neutral) from 33 yesterday; BTC dominance steady at 58.2%.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai pushed to 2027 over UAE regional security risks
stories.tldr: Organizers have postponed the May 2026 TOKEN2049 Dubai event to 2027, citing heightened security risks in the UAE amid ongoing regional conflict.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto's marquee Middle East gathering going dark for a year reroutes deal flow and sponsorship dollars to Singapore and Vegas — a real cost for Gulf-aligned funds and L1 marketing budgets.
the_details: Conference was scheduled for May 2026; new date now slated for 2027 with no specific month confirmed.
Organizers cited 'heightened security risks' tied to ongoing regional escalation following the U.S.–Iran ceasefire breakdown.
TOKEN2049 Singapore (October) is unaffected and now becomes 2026's de facto flagship gathering.
